title: One Two Three
desc: Three men named Laxmi Narayan—a wannabe hitman, a loyal aide to a powerful boss, and a women’s lingerie salesman—travel on business to Pondicherry and unexpectedly check into the same hotel.

title: Hogi Pyar Ki Jeet
desc: Two brothers reunite in order to fulfil the wish of their dying father whom Thakur bitterly humiliates and murders. They intend to marry Thakur's two daughters to seek revenge.

title: Pyaar Zindagi Hai
desc: After the marriage of his daughter, Hridaynath lives a simple life with his unmarried daughter in Dehra Dun. His newly married daughter pays them a visit. She finds out that Hridaynath has debts and is in trouble.

title: Powerful Game
desc: A man unravels the mysteries of his past and his upbringing while settling a village feud.
